# GIRL

**Grammar-Informed Refactoring Language** for AI coding agents.

## Installation

### Linux (amd64)
```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/canadian-ai/girl/releases/download/TAG/girl
chmod +x girl
sudo mv girl /usr/local/bin/
```

### Build from source
```bash
go install github.com/canadian-ai/girl/cmd/girl@latest
```

Requires Go 1.25+ and a C compiler (for tree-sitter).

## What's Changed

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/canadian-ai/girl/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md) for full release notes.
